description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of two jobs: Linting and Linux. The Linting job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.10, installs pre-commit, and runs linting on all files. The Linux job depends on Linting, runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for Python 3.10, installs dependencies, and tests with pytest.
